evals.prompt: I'm building a Gradio 6.9.0 app on Hugging Face Spaces. The desktop view at 1920x1080 looks okay but mobile portrait is broken with clipped buttons. Please fix the UX and include before/after screenshot evidence for both 16:9 and 9:16.
evals.expected_output: A response that enforces a screenshot-first workflow, then proposes responsive fixes with side-by-side evidence for both aspect ratios.

evals.prompt: Create a custom class-based Gradio component with custom CSS/JS for an interactive card input, and make sure it behaves well on desktop and smartphone portrait in Spaces.
evals.expected_output: A detailed class-based component plan with backend/frontend value contract, CSS namespacing, JS event safety, and dual-aspect-ratio validation steps.

evals.prompt: I changed three Gradio components and want a PR-ready UX report. Include per-component before/after screenshots from Playwright for 1920x1080 and 1080x1920 and call out any failed checks.
evals.expected_output: A structured PR evidence format with component-by-component visual comparison and pass/fail UX verdicts.
